phase-summary.outcome: Created a tracked execution plan for moving fast with controlled risk: feature-flag-first rollout, explicit cohorts, and lane-based acceleration options including third-party paths.

file.description: Added feature flags, rollout cohorts, acceleration lanes, and open questions with recommended default lane B.
Claimed and completed 50-02 under agent-20260303-893p; added 50-06 lane decision task.
Updated Phase 50 plans to include feature-flag-first and acceleration lane execution.
Recorded rollout and acceleration lane policy decisions for Phase 50.
Registered active agent and moved current pointer to 50-03 next-action.

tests.test: Planning docs updated and validated by loop snapshot and XML structure consistency checks.

next.action: Execute 50-03 and 50-04 in parallel with lane-B assumptions, then finalize 50-06 with scorecard thresholds.
